metadata.description: Claude Code skills for disciplined project startup. Currently ships cc-startup, with mvp-9-phases for building any new product from scratch.

plugins.name: cc-startup
plugins.description: Disciplined project startup. Includes mvp-9-phases: a nine-phase, interrogation-driven flow for building any new product, tool or service from scratch. The agent informs, the user decides — outputs are deterministic and measurable.
